ddls:
CREATE TABLE "training_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each training session */,
  "session_name" TEXT /* Name of the training session */,
  "session_date" TEXT /* Date the training session was conducted */,
  "presenter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the presenter who conducted the session */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department that organized the session */,
  "session_type" TEXT /* Type of the training session (e.g., classroom, online, webinar) */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the training session in hours */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the training session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_sessions_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_sessions_presenter_id FOREIGN KEY ("presenter_id") REFERENCES presenters ("presenter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "presenters" (
  "presenter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each presenter */,
  "presenter_name" TEXT /* Name of the presenter */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the presenter */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department the presenter belongs to */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biography of the presenter */,
  "expertise" TEXT /* Area of expertise of the presenter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("presenter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the department */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evaluation_criteria" (
  "criterion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each criterion */,
  "criterion_name" TEXT /* Name of the criterion (e.g., session objectives, content relevance) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the criterion */,
  "weightage" TEXT /* Weightage of the criterion in the overall evaluation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("criterion_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "session_evaluations" (
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evaluation */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the training session being evaluated */,
  "attendee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the attendee providing the evaluation */,
  "criterion_id" INTEGER /* ID of the evaluation criterion */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating provided by the attendee (1-5) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments provided by the attendee */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("evaluation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_session_evaluations_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES training_sessions ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_session_evaluations_criterion_id FOREIGN KEY ("criterion_id") REFERENCES evaluation_criteria ("criterion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_session_evaluations_attendee_id FOREIGN KEY ("attendee_id") REFERENCES attendees ("attendee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "attendees" (
  "attendee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attendee */,
  "attendee_name" TEXT /* Name of the attendee */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the attendee */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department the attendee belongs to */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the attendee */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attendee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "criterion_id" INTEGER /* ID of the evaluation criterion */,
  "rating_name" TEXT /* Name of the rating (e.g., Strongly Agree, Agree) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the rating */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the training session the report is based on */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., summary, detailed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES training_sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_criteria" (
  "criterion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each criterion */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report the criterion is used for */,
  "criterion_name" TEXT /* Name of the criterion (e.g., average rating, number of attendees) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the criterion */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("criterion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_criteria_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., administrator, presenter, attendee) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role the permission is assigned to */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission (e.g., view reports, manage users) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permission_assignments" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the permission assigned to the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "session_attendees" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the training session */,
  "attendee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the attendee */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id", "attendee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "session_criteria" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the training session */,
  "criterion_id" INTEGER /* ID of the evaluation criterion */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id", "criterion_id")
)
